summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GenZ AI multi-agent productivity system. All core features working correctly including multi-agent coordination, task management, and Neo-Brutalist UI design.
passed_tests: User registration and login flow
Task creation with automatic priority detection (high/medium/low)
Task completion toggle and deletion
Notes creation and deletion
Calendar events creation and deletion
Multi-agent chat system with coordinator routing
Task agent for task-related queries
Schedule agent for planning and calendar queries
Notes agent for note summarization
Coordinator agent for general 'what should I do next' queries
Agent activity monitor with real-time logs
Quick action buttons (What should I do next, Create daily plan, Summarize notes, Show priorities)
Neo-Brutalist design with 2px borders and 4px shadows
Terminal-style agent activity panel with black background and mint green text
Proper typography hierarchy (Work Sans, IBM Plex Sans, IBM Plex Mono)
Priority detection and visual indicators
Tab navigation between Tasks, Notes, and Calendar
Responsive layout structure
JWT authentication and token management
All CRUD operations for tasks, notes, and events
OpenAI GPT-4o integration via Emergent LLM key

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (minor JS selector issue in one test, all functionality working)
